name: Scribe Automated How-To Documentation API
what_it_does: Scribe automated how-to documentation REST API for operations, L&D, and support teams to automatically generate step-by-step process guides from screen recordings with AI-generated instructions and one-click sharing. Enables AI agents to manage Scribe document retrieval and export for process documentation automation, handle team workspace and folder organization for documentation taxonomy automation, access document sharing and permission management for knowledge distribution automation, retrieve process guide embedding and iframe integration for portal documentation automation, manage team member access and document ownership for documentation governance automation, handle PDF and HTML export for offline and print documentation automation, access page count and usage analytics for documentation adoption tracking automation, retrieve custom branding and logo on exported guides for white-label documentation automation, manage workspace integration with tools like Confluence, Notion, and Coda for documentation workflow automation, and integrate Scribe with Confluence, Notion, Coda, Slack, and LMS platforms for end-to-end process documentation automation.
use_cases: Exporting process guides from SOPs automation agents
Embedding how-to docs from support portal agents
Managing documentation libraries from ops knowledge agents
Sharing training materials from L&D content agents
not_for: General team knowledge base and wiki (use Notion or Slab for flexible docs)
Technical API and code documentation (use Readme.com or Swagger)
Video-based training content creation (use Loom or Camtasia)
best_when: An operations, L&D, or support team wanting AI agents to automate process documentation export, guide sharing, portal embedding, and documentation library management through Scribe's auto-generated step-by-step guide platform.
avoid_when: SCRIBE CREATION IS CHROME EXTENSION ONLY — NOT API: Scribe step-by-step guides are created via Chrome browser extension recording user actions; automated guide creation cannot be triggered via API; API access is limited to managing, sharing, and exporting existing Scribe documents; automated documentation generation workflows must still rely on human Chrome extension recording for guide creation. SCRIBE CONTENT QUALITY DEPENDS ON RECORDING QUALITY: Auto-generated Scribe guide accuracy depends on recording quality and UI consistency; automated documentation workflows that share Scribe guides without human review create risk of distributing guides with inaccurate steps if UI changed since recording; implement review checkpoint before automated distribution. API PRIMARILY FOR MANAGEMENT NOT CONTENT AUTHORING: Scribe public API focuses on document management (retrieve, share, export) rather than content authoring; automated content creation workflows expecting programmatic guide generation find Scribe API insufficient for creation use case; scope automation to post-creation management activities.

auth.notes: Scribe uses API key and OAuth for integrations. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ. Founded 2019 by Jennifer Smith and Aaron Kesler. Backed by Sequoia, Accel, Tiger Global ($53M+ raised). Products: Auto-generated step-by-step guides from Chrome extension, team workspace, PDF/HTML export, iframe embed, integrations. Integrations: Confluence, Notion, Coda, Slack, Google Workspace, Salesforce. GDPR. SOC2. 3M+ users. Competes with Tango, Guidde, and Loom for process documentation.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free Basic plan (unlimited Scribes, limited sharing, no PDF export, Scribe watermark)
pricing.paid_tiers: Pro ($23/user/mo), Teams ($12/user/mo min 5 users), Enterprise (custom); annual discount
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. Sequoia/Accel backed. Free Basic + paid. No credit card for free tier. Annual discount.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; document retrieval and export queries throttled; no webhooks

known_agent_gotchas: API CANNOT CREATE SCRIBES — CHROME EXTENSION ONLY: The most critical agent gotcha: Scribe API does not expose guide creation capability; automated documentation creation workflows cannot initiate screen recording or generate guides programmatically; API scope is read (retrieve guides) and manage (share, export, organize); automated workflows that assume API creation capability will find no create endpoint

NO WEBHOOKS FOR GUIDE CREATION NOTIFICATION: Scribe provides no webhooks; automated workflows that need to react to new guide creation (e.g., route new guides to review workflow) must poll document list endpoint; polling frequency must balance freshness against API rate limits

PDF EXPORT REQUIRES PAID PLAN — API CHECK NEEDED: Scribe PDF export is a paid plan feature; automated PDF report generation via API must verify account subscription tier supports PDF export; automated export workflows on free plan encounter feature-gated error without pre-check

IFRAME EMBED URL PERMISSIONS FOR EXTERNAL PORTALS: Scribe embedded guides require appropriate sharing permission for iframe embedding; automated portal documentation embedding must verify each Scribe's sharing setting allows public iframe access; automated embedding of workspace-only restricted Scribes in public portal creates permission error for portal visitors

SCRIBE CONTENT STALENESS AFTER UI CHANGES: Scribe guides capture point-in-time UI screenshots; when underlying software UI changes, Scribe screenshots become stale showing old UI; automated documentation distribution must include guide review date and implement periodic staleness check workflows to maintain documentation accuracy
agent_readiness.security_notes: Process documentation. SOC2, GDPR. API key/OAuth2. US. Process guide and team documentation data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Process documentation. SOC2, GDPR. API key/OAuth2. US. Guide and documentation data.
